metadata.description: AI-powered smart contract security auditor with parallel hunt lanes, Devil's Advocate verification, static analysis (Slither, Aderyn), fuzz testing (Echidna, Medusa), symbolic execution (Halmos), Solodit intelligence, and interactive Map-Hunt-Attack methodology
